title: Bridge Paper: Sense of agency disturbances in movement disorders: A comprehensive review.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nested Agency** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Free will — sense of agency, voluntary action, intentional binding, volitional control.
**Phase context:** sense of agency, voluntary action, free will, intentional binding, volition

Paper: Sense of agency disturbances in movement disorders: A comprehensive review.
DOI: 10.1016/j.concog.2021.103228
Abstract: Sense of agency refers to the experience that one's self-generated action causes an event in the external environment. Here, we review the behavioural and brain evidence of aberrant experiences of agency in movement disorders, clinical conditions characterized by either a paucity or an excess of movements unrelated to the patient's intention.
